title: Subcircuit assigns needles to haystack nodes already in use during extract pass

features.name: triple same cell type in subcircuit map module
features.description: Code should include a module with three parallel instances of the same gate type (e.g., three AND gates with independent inputs/outputs) used as a subcircuit extraction map

features.name: distributed and-or combinational logic as subcircuit haystack
features.description: Code should include an always block with combinational OR-of-AND logic where AND and OR operations are separate nodes (e.g., y <= (a&b)|(c&d)) serving as the haystack for subcircuit extraction
